programme.title: Bollywood Calling
programme.desc: Patrick Stormaire, an ill, alcoholic American film director sets out to make a Bollywood movie. However, when he arrives in India, he learns that the script is yet to be written.

programme.title: Logout
programme.desc: Pratyush, a popular social media influencer, is on the verge of the 10 million followers milestone. However, he finds his life turned upside-down after a crazed fan steals his phone.

programme.title: A.B.C.D
programme.desc: Vishnu, a professional choreographer who quit his dance company due to disagreements with his manager, decides to form his own team together to win a major dance competition.

programme.title: Jab We Met
programme.desc: Aditya, a heartbroken business tycoon, aimlessly boards a train to escape his depressing life. Soon, he meets Geet, a bubbly Punjabi girl, and gets pulled into her crazy life.

programme.title: Kabali
programme.desc: When Kabali raises his voice against the oppression faced by Tamil labourers in Malaysia, he is imprisoned for 25 years. After being released, he seeks revenge on the ones who wronged him.

programme.title: Jolly LLB
programme.desc: Jolly, a struggling lawyer seeking success, comes upon a hit-and-run case and decides to fight for the victims. However, the defendant hires a proficient lawyer, Rajpal, to go against him.

programme.title: Jolly LLB 2
programme.desc: A lawyer hoodwinks a woman to start his own law firm. However, he feels guilty and tries to make things right when he finds out that she commits suicide for failing to get justice for her husband.

programme.title: Rangoon
programme.desc: Julia journeys to the Indo-Burma border to perform for the troops during World War II, on the insistence of Billimoria, her lover. There, she finds herself enamoured by Jemadar Malik, a soldier.

programme.title: Chandu Champion
programme.desc: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

programme.title: Pippa
programme.desc: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry tank squadron steps up to prove his worth by fighting on the eastern front during the Indo-Pakistani war of 1971.

programme.title: Student of the Year 2
programme.desc: Rohan follows his lover, Mridula, to St Teresa's college hoping to reunite with her. There, he befriends Manav, the most popular student, but is constantly at loggerheads with his sister, Shreya.

programme.title: Dark Chocolate
programme.desc: This thriller murder mystery is an adaptation of the real life murder case of Sheena Bora. The discovery of a charred corpse in the woods, leads to a high-profile murder investigation.
